content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom 14 (N):

Atom 14 is nitrogen (N) in blue, and it is covalently connected to:
- Atom 15 (N): nitrogen
- Atom 13 (C): carbon  
- Atom 16 (C): carbon

From the image, I can see that atom 14 (N) forms three bonds: one to atom 15 (N), one to atom 13 (C), and one to atom 16 (C).

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file naming convention in the working directory, the molecule appears to be from file "geomconf_823.xyz", which suggests the geomconf_index is 823.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 14 (N) are:
- Atom 15 (N)
- Atom 13 (C) 
- Atom 16 (C)

And the geomconf_index is 823.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 14, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
